assertions.reason: Services page shows all three individual offerings with required pricing and duration details.
evidence: content-check:/services contains Unlock Session (~3hrs, $1,500), Personal Stack Build (2 weeks, $5,000), Sparring Partner (Monthly $1,500 - $2,500)

assertions.reason: Services page shows all four team offerings with required price ranges.
evidence: content-check:/services contains Discovery ($3,000-$5,000), Build ($8,000-$15,000), Train ($2,500-$5,000), Retainer (Monthly $2,000-$4,000)

assertions.reason: Services page explicitly states the natural path: individual leader/CEO gains value first, then brings capacity to the team.
evidence: content-check:/services intro includes 'natural path of engagement begins with the individual leader... CEO gains personal technical capability... then brings this capacity to the rest of the organization'

assertions.reason: Contact page displays contact@statecraft.systems as the contact method.
Contact page frames outreach around structural alignment and fit rather than generic inquiry language.
evidence: content-check:/contact contains 'structural alignment' and 'determine if there is a fit'

frictions: Inline multi-command heredoc eval failed once in shell chaining; resolved by running eval as a separate command without impact on validation outcomes.
